title: gate-stats correctness: exact methods for zero-inflated n=100; Wilson/Newcombe-paired adopted; round-2 sized before launch; receipted review
method: leo gate consolidation — pointers grepped live + receipt contents read (not asserted)

clause_2_round2_sized_before_launch.contents: MDE-by-k (k=8,16,24,32) + MC power grid (sample-level + task-level any-of-k) + null-rejection rate; frozen BEFORE round-2 from g1-base empirical rates

clause_3_receipted_review.power_caveat: null verdict at n=100 near p~=0 is underpowered: deltas below ~6pp invisible; the round-2 response is k-scaling (r2-power MDE-by-k), not larger n alone

mde_definition_note: power_helper anchors (n100=10.16pp, n400=3.85pp at p0=2%) vs stats_exact paired_mde (n100=8.9pp, n200=6.3pp) differ by MDE DEFINITION (per-arm vs paired, p0 assumption) — both documented, not in conflict
caveats: review consolidation, not a new experiment
adoption verified by live grep of the verdict path; sizing + review receipt contents read directly
